characters.name: Alfred the Armor
characters.description: Alfred the Armor is Mike’s titular suit of armor that is secretly self aware. He is the most onscreen character in the series, besides Mike. Alfred is unable to control Mike’s brain or dictate his actions, as Mike’s influence is far too strong. Alfred can only be commandeered by Mike’s body, as he cannot move himself.

characters.name: Edward
characters.description: Edward is a major antagonist in season 3. He hails from a kingdom in which his father is king, but unlike Mike's father, he & his father are portrayed as rude towards others. He isMike'srival, who often tries to cause trouble around him and Glendragon, and has even caused trouble forEvieat times, but his plans always backfire in the end, mostly by Mike. He rides his horse namedFlynn, and has a peregrine falcon bird named Shadow.

characters.name: Galahad
characters.description: Galahad in the castle stable Galahad with Mike GalahadisMike's horse. Galahad is Mike's best trusty steed knight horse in the whole kingdom! Mike rides Galahad all overGlendragonfor a lot of missions with his sisterEvieand his dragonsSparkieandSquirt. Mike loves Galahad because he is his favorite horse in the whole wide world!

characters.name: Princess Evie
characters.description: Evie is Mike's Little sister who appears in Mike The Knight Evie wears a red wizard's hat, a matching coat, a purple light dress, and star-shaped hairties on her bunches. She is the daughter ofQueen Martha, younger sister ofMike. Her frog isMr. Cuddles.

characters.name: Sparkie
characters.description: Sparkieis a big red dragon who breathes fire. He sometimes works as a cook and chef. He isSquirtand Mike's best friend. He is a goofy, fun loving dragon. He can’t fly like Squirt due to his size, but to make up for this, he's also very strong.

characters.name: Sparkie

characters.name: Squirt
characters.description:
Squirtis a blue-green water-breathing dragon. He usually hangs out with Mike andSparkie. He sometimes puts out Sparkie's big fires with water.
Squirt is very friendly, but also very timid. ”I’m squirting everywhere!” ”My name is squirt and I just squirted.”

characters.name: Trollee
characters.description: Trollee Being a troll is a fun life. I live in a cave with my Ma and my Pa. We sing, cook, play tag in the caves, and love to look for food in the Tall Tree Woods! But I have to say, being a knight looks like lots of fun too. Sometimes, I get to practice knightly things with Mike in the arena and I even get to go on a few missions. Mike is a good friend. He is voiced byNissae Isen.
